#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
HPC CUDA C++ Optimizer Library — Self-Extracting Installer
Run:  python3 hpc_optimizer_installer.py
Output directory: ./hpc_optimizer/
"""
import base64, os, sys

FILES = {
    "CMakeLists.txt": "",
    "README.md": "",
    ".github/workflows/benchmark.yml": "",
    ".github/workflows/ci.yml": "",
    "examples/train_multigpu.cu": "",
    "examples/train_single.cu": "",
    "examples/train_zero2.cu": "",
    "examples/train_zero3_tp.cu": "",
    "include/hpc_adam.cuh": "",
    "include/hpc_checkpoint.cuh": "",
    "include/hpc_comm.cuh": "",
    "include/hpc_grad_clip.cuh": "",
    "include/hpc_lamb.cuh": "",
    "include/hpc_lion.cuh": "",
    "include/hpc_lr_scheduler.cuh": "",
    "include/hpc_optimizer.cuh": "",
    "include/hpc_precision.cuh": "",
    "include/hpc_profiler.cuh": "",
    "include/hpc_sgd.cuh": "",
    "include/hpc_tensor_parallel.cuh": "",
    "include/hpc_types.h": "",
    "include/hpc_zero2.cuh": "",
    "include/hpc_zero2_optimizer.cuh": "",
    "include/hpc_zero3.cuh": "",
    "scripts/check_regression.py": "",
    "scripts/setup_runner.sh": "",
    "scripts/slurm_test.sh": "",
    "tests/test_hpc_optimizers.cu": "",
    "tests/test_precision.cu": "",
    "tests/test_zero2.cu": "",
    "tests/test_zero3.cu": "",
}

def extract(dest="hpc_optimizer"):
    for relpath, b64 in FILES.items():
        out = os.path.join(dest, relpath)
        os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(out) or ".", exist_ok=True)
        with open(out, "wb") as f:
            f.write(base64.b64decode(b64))
        print(f"  wrote {out}")
    print(f"\nDone — {len(FILES)} files extracted to ./{dest}/")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    dest = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "hpc_optimizer"
    print(f"Extracting HPC Optimizer Library -> ./{dest}/")
    extract(dest)
